$comment: Machine-readable MAP of the Finish It capability pipeline. This file holds POINTERS + orchestration metadata only — the real logic lives in the referenced skill bodies (skills/*.md) and workflows (.github/workflows/*.yml). It must never duplicate that logic. Edit a stage's behaviour in its `implementedBy` file; edit only wiring/metadata here. See AGENTS.md for the human narrative.
name: Finish It — Capability Pipeline
description: Autonomous QA/capability loop with GitHub as the orchestrator and a human merge gate. A capability (or a qa-tester finding) becomes a scoped issue, an auto-fixer PR, a deterministic gate, an advisory review, a bounded fix-loop, then a human merge that triggers Cloudflare redeploy.

conventions.skillBody: Harness-agnostic body under skills/. Invoked identically by every harness via a thin stub.
conventions.harnessEntries: Thin per-harness stubs that only carry frontmatter and point at the skill body. Claude Code: .claude/commands/<name>.md · Copilot CLI: .agents/skills/<name>/SKILL.md · other agents resolve via AGENTS.md.

labels.agent-found: Routes an issue to auto-fixer.yml. ONLY for index.html-shaped app issues.
labels.agent-found-local: Routes an issue to the local shiplocal back-half (no GitHub Actions auto-fix trigger).
labels.capability:<cap>: Auto-created by scope/ship; tags the capability area.
labels.fix-attempt-N: Counts fix-loop retries on a PR (cap 3).

guardrails.ordering: Deterministic gate (free) runs before any paid LLM review.
guardrails.humanGate: Never auto-merge to the live site; notifications end at the human.
guardrails.iterationCaps: Live in YAML, never in a prompt (fix-loop = 3).
guardrails.scope: Agents stay inside index.html / tests/ (or the issue's scope); never touch plan/.
guardrails.cost: sonnet default; --max-turns on every CI agent; spend cap in the Anthropic Console.

entrypoints.ship: Run research + scope in one prompt (skills/ship.md).
entrypoints.shiplocal: Run research + local-scope, then execute auto-fix + gate + fix-loop + review locally and open a PR.
entrypoints.qa-tester: Bypass research+scope; drive the live app and file agent-found issues directly.
entrypoints.issueLabel: Apply the agent-found label to any issue to enter at the auto-fix stage.
entrypoints.workflowDispatch: (planned, Chunk A1) re-run auto-fixer against an issue number from the Actions UI.

outputs: exactly one deduped issue: labels agent-found + capability:<cap> + enhancement; body carries an executable '## Acceptance test (Playwright)' block

inputs: the agent-found issue (title + body, incl. the '## Acceptance test' block)
outputs: branch fix/issue-<N> (acceptance test written verbatim + index.html fix)
stages.invoke: remove + re-add the agent-found label (labeled only fires on add); planned: workflow_dispatch (Chunk A1)

checks: Playwright smoke of the core loop + the issue's acceptance test (tests/*.spec.js)
stages.invoke: re-run the workflow from the PR's Checks tab

stages.trigger: workflow_run: Quality Gate completed with conclusion == failure
stages.cap: 3 attempts (tracked by fix-attempt-N labels), then hands off to a human
outputs: a fix commit pushed to the PR branch (re-triggers the gate)
stages.invoke: automatic on gate failure; reset by removing fix-attempt-N labels

outputs: a single advisory PR comment (## Adversarial Review)
stages.invoke: re-run the workflow from the PR's Checks tab

stages.trigger: human review of a green, reviewed PR
outputs: merge to main → issue auto-closed → Cloudflare redeploys the live site
stages.invoke: review + Merge (the gate that never auto-fires)

inputs: existing or newly filed agent-found-local issue
